name: Browse CLI
description: Browserbase CLI for browser automation driven by a skill catalog (browse.sh). Use when a curated skill exists for the target portal; otherwise prefer dev-browser.
install: manual review required: browse is not in VALIDATED_DEPENDENCIES.md
rate_limit_note: Local mode is fully free and requires no API key. browse cloud * commands require BROWSERBASE_API_KEY (paid; 1k free fetch + 1k free search calls per month). Do not use cloud APIs for sensitive sources.
